title: Healable
description: Defines the interactions with this entity for healing it.

filters.description: Optional. Filter conditions that must be met for the entity to be healable.

force_use.description: Determines if item can be used regardless of entity being full health.

items.description: The list of items that can be used to heal this entity.

item.description: Name of the item this entity likes and can be used to heal this entity.

heal_amount.description: The amount of health this entity gains when fed this item.

filters.description: The filters to test before applying any healing for the item.
